The Glide image proxy's URL validation could be bypassed using an IP representation that wasn't normalized before the public-IP check. An unauthenticated user could cause the server to make HTTP requests to internal addresses — including loopback, private network, and cloud metadata endpoints.

This affects sites that pass user-supplied URLs to Glide. Sites running PHP 8.3 or newer are not affected.

### Patches

This has been fixed in 5.73.22 and 6.18.1", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00151, "percentile": 0.04628}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pf9c-ch8r-2958", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T15:32:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pf9c-ch8r-2958", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pf9c-ch8r-2958"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45660"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-29T18:17:11Z", "published_at": "2026-05-18T15:32:43Z", "references": ["https://github.com/statamic/cms/security/advisories/GHSA-pf9c-ch8r-2958", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45660", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pf9c-ch8r-2958"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/statamic/cms/security-advisories/GHSA-pf9c-ch8r-2958", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/statamic/cms", "summary": "Statamic CMS: Server-Side Request Forgery via Glide", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:30:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pf9c-ch8r-2958", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.73.22", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "statamic/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.73.22"}, {"first_patched_version": "6.18.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "statamic/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.0.0-alpha.1, < 6.18.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Statamic CMS: Server-Side Request Forgery via Glide
